channel.title: Level on 🎮 Human: Fall Flat - Walkthroughs & Guides
channel.description: Recent content in Level on 🎮 Human: Fall Flat - Walkthroughs & Guides

item.title: 🌃 Level 11: Dark
item.description:
🌃 Level 11: Dark

Current Status: 📡 Dream signals syncing… To be continued, stay tuned for the latest detailed level guides. Level Matrix: Difficulty ⭐⭐⭐⭐☆ | Est. Duration 30 Mins

📸 🌃 Level 11: Dark Level Overview - Dreamscape Coordinate Calibration

🔑 Level Clearance Secrets (MISSION TIPS)

Every dream level features unique gaps in its physics logic. While our full walkthrough captures are being uploaded, we have unlocked the Clearance Secret for you:

⚡ Clearance Secret ⚡
After plugging the red and blue wires into the distribution box, pull out the backup generator plug and hang it on the pulley wire to zipline directly to the backyard exit.

Guides editing… Wobbly Bob telemetry is feeded live from Bobs worldwide. Got a faster route? Submit your highlights to us!

item.title: 💨 Level 12: Steam
item.description:
💨 Level 12: Steam

Current Status: 📡 Dream signals syncing… To be continued, stay tuned for the latest detailed level guides. Level Matrix: Difficulty ⭐⭐⭐☆☆ | Est. Duration 30 Mins

📸 💨 Level 12: Steam Level Overview - Dreamscape Coordinate Calibration

🔑 Level Clearance Secrets (MISSION TIPS)

Every dream level features unique gaps in its physics logic. While our full walkthrough captures are being uploaded, we have unlocked the Clearance Secret for you:

⚡ Clearance Secret ⚡
Step on the high-pressure steam vent, and jump the moment the vent releases a steam burst. The steam will lift you up, launching you instantly into the high pipe tunnel.

Guides editing… Wobbly Bob telemetry is feeded live from Bobs worldwide. Got a faster route? Submit your highlights to us!

item.title: ❄️ Level 13: Ice
item.description:
❄️ Level 13: Ice

Current Status: 📡 Dream signals syncing… To be continued, stay tuned for the latest detailed level guides. Level Matrix: Difficulty ⭐⭐⭐☆☆ | Est. Duration 25 Mins

📸 ❄️ Level 13: Ice Level Overview - Dreamscape Coordinate Calibration

🔑 Level Clearance Secrets (MISSION TIPS)

Every dream level features unique gaps in its physics logic. While our full walkthrough captures are being uploaded, we have unlocked the Clearance Secret for you:

⚡ Clearance Secret ⚡
Place a wooden plank on the ice slope and slide down using your body as a drag brake to gain double the jump velocity before reaching the cliff edge.

Guides editing… Wobbly Bob telemetry is feeded live from Bobs worldwide. Got a faster route? Submit your highlights to us!

item.title: 🌋 Level 14: Thermal
item.description:
🌋 Level 14: Thermal

Current Status: 📡 Dream signals syncing… To be continued, stay tuned for the latest detailed level guides. Level Matrix: Difficulty ⭐⭐⭐⭐☆ | Est. Duration 35 Mins

📸 🌋 Level 14: Thermal Level Overview - Dreamscape Coordinate Calibration

🔑 Level Clearance Secrets (MISSION TIPS)

Every dream level features unique gaps in its physics logic. While our full walkthrough captures are being uploaded, we have unlocked the Clearance Secret for you:

⚡ Clearance Secret ⚡
Grab the bottom bar of the hot air balloon. When it reaches its peak height, swing your body sideways and let go to float down directly into the exit cave.

Guides editing… Wobbly Bob telemetry is feeded live from Bobs worldwide. Got a faster route? Submit your highlights to us!

item.title: ⛳ Level 15: Golf
item.description:
⛳ Level 15: Golf

Current Status: 📡 Dream signals syncing… To be continued, stay tuned for the latest detailed level guides. Level Matrix: Difficulty ⭐⭐⭐☆☆ | Est. Duration 25 Mins

📸 ⛳ Level 15: Golf Level Overview - Dreamscape Coordinate Calibration

🔑 Level Clearance Secrets (MISSION TIPS)

Every dream level features unique gaps in its physics logic. While our full walkthrough captures are being uploaded, we have unlocked the Clearance Secret for you:

⚡ Clearance Secret ⚡
When hitting the golf ball, hang Bob directly on the club and act as a gravity pendulum to strike the ball with massive force, putting it into the far hole in a single shot.

Guides editing… Wobbly Bob telemetry is feeded live from Bobs worldwide. Got a faster route? Submit your highlights to us!

item.title: 🏙️ Level 16: City
item.description:
🏙️ Level 16: City

Current Status: 📡 Dream signals syncing… To be continued, stay tuned for the latest detailed level guides. Level Matrix: Difficulty ⭐⭐⭐⭐☆ | Est. Duration 30 Mins

📸 🏙️ Level 16: City Level Overview - Dreamscape Coordinate Calibration

🔑 Level Clearance Secrets (MISSION TIPS)

Every dream level features unique gaps in its physics logic. While our full walkthrough captures are being uploaded, we have unlocked the Clearance Secret for you:

⚡ Clearance Secret ⚡
Utilize the continuous bouncing force of the trampoline, and jump on the third bounce (when the amplitude is largest) to jump directly onto the rooftop helipad.

Guides editing… Wobbly Bob telemetry is feeded live from Bobs worldwide. Got a faster route? Submit your highlights to us!

item.title: 🌲 Level 17: Forest
item.description:
🌲 Level 17: Forest

Current Status: 📡 Dream signals syncing… To be continued, stay tuned for the latest detailed level guides. Level Matrix: Difficulty ⭐⭐⭐⭐☆ | Est. Duration 35 Mins

📸 🌲 Level 17: Forest Level Overview - Dreamscape Coordinate Calibration

🔑 Level Clearance Secrets (MISSION TIPS)

Every dream level features unique gaps in its physics logic. While our full walkthrough captures are being uploaded, we have unlocked the Clearance Secret for you:

⚡ Clearance Secret ⚡
Fell the trees to make them fall between cliffs to create a bridge, or use the rope to hook onto tree trunks to execute pendulum swings across the deep chasms.

Guides editing… Wobbly Bob telemetry is feeded live from Bobs worldwide. Got a faster route? Submit your highlights to us!

item.title: 🔬 Level 18: Laboratory
item.description:
🔬 Level 18: Laboratory

Current Status: 📡 Dream signals syncing… To be continued, stay tuned for the latest detailed level guides. Level Matrix: Difficulty ⭐⭐⭐⭐☆ | Est. Duration 30 Mins

📸 🔬 Level 18: Laboratory Level Overview - Dreamscape Coordinate Calibration

🔑 Level Clearance Secrets (MISSION TIPS)

Every dream level features unique gaps in its physics logic. While our full walkthrough captures are being uploaded, we have unlocked the Clearance Secret for you:

⚡ Clearance Secret ⚡
Use the electromagnet to attract the steel sphere as a suspended basket, and jump the moment it powers on to use the electromagnetic repulsion to fling yourself into the high pipes.

Guides editing… Wobbly Bob telemetry is feeded live from Bobs worldwide. Got a faster route? Submit your highlights to us!

item.title: 🪵 Level 19: Lumber
item.description:
🪵 Level 19: Lumber

Current Status: 📡 Dream signals syncing… To be continued, stay tuned for the latest detailed level guides. Level Matrix: Difficulty ⭐⭐⭐⭐☆ | Est. Duration 35 Mins

📸 🪵 Level 19: Lumber Level Overview - Dreamscape Coordinate Calibration

🔑 Level Clearance Secrets (MISSION TIPS)

Every dream level features unique gaps in its physics logic. While our full walkthrough captures are being uploaded, we have unlocked the Clearance Secret for you:

⚡ Clearance Secret ⚡
Bind multiple logs together to make a raft, steer the paddle to stay balanced in the center, and you can float directly through the violent rapids.

Guides editing… Wobbly Bob telemetry is feeded live from Bobs worldwide. Got a faster route? Submit your highlights to us!

item.title: 🏜️ Level 20: Red Rock
item.description:
🏜️ Level 20: Red Rock

Current Status: 📡 Dream signals syncing… To be continued, stay tuned for the latest detailed level guides. Level Matrix: Difficulty ⭐⭐⭐⭐☆ | Est. Duration 30 Mins

📸 🏜️ Level 20: Red Rock Level Overview - Dreamscape Coordinate Calibration

🔑 Level Clearance Secrets (MISSION TIPS)

Every dream level features unique gaps in its physics logic. While our full walkthrough captures are being uploaded, we have unlocked the Clearance Secret for you:

⚡ Clearance Secret ⚡
Use the airflow generated by the fans combined with the glider to perform long-distance glides, flying directly over the vast canyon terrain.

Guides editing… Wobbly Bob telemetry is feeded live from Bobs worldwide. Got a faster route? Submit your highlights to us!

item.title: 🗼 Level 21: Tower
item.description:
🗼 Level 21: Tower

Current Status: 📡 Dream signals syncing… To be continued, stay tuned for the latest detailed level guides. Level Matrix: Difficulty ⭐⭐⭐⭐☆ | Est. Duration 35 Mins

📸 🗼 Level 21: Tower Level Overview - Dreamscape Coordinate Calibration

🔑 Level Clearance Secrets (MISSION TIPS)

Every dream level features unique gaps in its physics logic. While our full walkthrough captures are being uploaded, we have unlocked the Clearance Secret for you:

⚡ Clearance Secret ⚡
When climbing the rotating gear on the tower wall, jump in the direction of the gear's rotation to let the tangential force fling you to the opposite water pipe.

Guides editing… Wobbly Bob telemetry is feeded live from Bobs worldwide. Got a faster route? Submit your highlights to us!

item.title: 🔍 Level 22: Miniature
item.description:
🔍 Level 22: Miniature

Current Status: 📡 Dream signals syncing… To be continued, stay tuned for the latest detailed level guides. Level Matrix: Difficulty ⭐⭐⭐☆☆ | Est. Duration 25 Mins

📸 🔍 Level 22: Miniature Level Overview - Dreamscape Coordinate Calibration

🔑 Level Clearance Secrets (MISSION TIPS)

Every dream level features unique gaps in its physics logic. While our full walkthrough captures are being uploaded, we have unlocked the Clearance Secret for you:

⚡ Clearance Secret ⚡
Between the giant microwave and the toy car, step on the trunk of the toy car and jump to use the car's collision box to bounce directly onto the table.

Guides editing… Wobbly Bob telemetry is feeded live from Bobs worldwide. Got a faster route? Submit your highlights to us!

item.title: 🪙 Level 23: Copper World
item.description:
🪙 Level 23: Copper World

Current Status: 📡 Dream signals syncing… To be continued, stay tuned for the latest detailed level guides. Level Matrix: Difficulty ⭐⭐⭐⭐☆ | Est. Duration 35 Mins

📸 🪙 Level 23: Copper World Level Overview - Dreamscape Coordinate Calibration

🔑 Level Clearance Secrets (MISSION TIPS)

Every dream level features unique gaps in its physics logic. While our full walkthrough captures are being uploaded, we have unlocked the Clearance Secret for you:

⚡ Clearance Secret ⚡
Operate the giant electromagnetic crane to grab the battery directly in mid-air and drop it into the slot, saving you the effort of pulling power switches.

Guides editing… Wobbly Bob telemetry is feeded live from Bobs worldwide. Got a faster route? Submit your highlights to us!

item.title: ⚓ Level 24: Port
item.description:
⚓ Level 24: Port

Current Status: 📡 Dream signals syncing… To be continued, stay tuned for the latest detailed level guides. Level Matrix: Difficulty ⭐⭐⭐⭐☆ | Est. Duration 30 Mins

📸 ⚓ Level 24: Port Level Overview - Dreamscape Coordinate Calibration

🔑 Level Clearance Secrets (MISSION TIPS)

Every dream level features unique gaps in its physics logic. While our full walkthrough captures are being uploaded, we have unlocked the Clearance Secret for you:

⚡ Clearance Secret ⚡
Use the crane hook to pull the cargo ship closer to the dock, jump onto the ship's mast, and swing directly to the lighthouse on the opposite shore to skip container moving.

Guides editing… Wobbly Bob telemetry is feeded live from Bobs worldwide. Got a faster route? Submit your highlights to us!

item.title: 🐳 Level 25: Underwater
item.description:
🐳 Level 25: Underwater

Current Status: 📡 Dream signals syncing… To be continued, stay tuned for the latest detailed level guides. Level Matrix: Difficulty ⭐⭐⭐⭐☆ | Est. Duration 35 Mins

📸 🐳 Level 25: Underwater Level Overview - Dreamscape Coordinate Calibration

🔑 Level Clearance Secrets (MISSION TIPS)

Every dream level features unique gaps in its physics logic. While our full walkthrough captures are being uploaded, we have unlocked the Clearance Secret for you:

⚡ Clearance Secret ⚡
When diving, grab the side wing of the underwater scooter and use the thruster's momentum to crash directly through the fragile glass panels at the bottom of the sea.

Guides editing… Wobbly Bob telemetry is feeded live from Bobs worldwide. Got a faster route? Submit your highlights to us!

item.title: 🥾 Level 26: Hike
item.description:
🥾 Level 26: Hike

Current Status: 📡 Dream signals syncing… To be continued, stay tuned for the latest detailed level guides. Level Matrix: Difficulty ⭐⭐⭐☆☆ | Est. Duration 25 Mins

📸 🥾 Level 26: Hike Level Overview - Dreamscape Coordinate Calibration

🔑 Level Clearance Secrets (MISSION TIPS)

Every dream level features unique gaps in its physics logic. While our full walkthrough captures are being uploaded, we have unlocked the Clearance Secret for you:

⚡ Clearance Secret ⚡
Use a loose boulder as a seesaw, place a box on one end, and jump from a high place onto the other end to launch the box up onto the cliff.

Guides editing… Wobbly Bob telemetry is feeded live from Bobs worldwide. Got a faster route? Submit your highlights to us!

item.title: 🧬 Level 27: Test Chamber
item.description:
🧬 Level 27: Test Chamber

Current Status: 📡 Dream signals syncing… To be continued, stay tuned for the latest detailed level guides. Level Matrix: Difficulty ⭐⭐⭐⭐☆ | Est. Duration 30 Mins

📸 🧬 Level 27: Test Chamber Level Overview - Dreamscape Coordinate Calibration

🔑 Level Clearance Secrets (MISSION TIPS)

Every dream level features unique gaps in its physics logic. While our full walkthrough captures are being uploaded, we have unlocked the Clearance Secret for you:

⚡ Clearance Secret ⚡
Use the gravity inversion device. The moment gravity reverses, grab the edge of the ceiling with both hands to slide directly into the exit room.

Guides editing… Wobbly Bob telemetry is feeded live from Bobs worldwide. Got a faster route? Submit your highlights to us!

item.title: 🍭 Level 28: Candyland
item.description:
🍭 Level 28: Candyland

Current Status: 📡 Dream signals syncing… To be continued, stay tuned for the latest detailed level guides. Level Matrix: Difficulty ⭐⭐⭐☆☆ | Est. Duration 25 Mins

📸 🍭 Level 28: Candyland Level Overview - Dreamscape Coordinate Calibration

🔑 Level Clearance Secrets (MISSION TIPS)

Every dream level features unique gaps in its physics logic. While our full walkthrough captures are being uploaded, we have unlocked the Clearance Secret for you:

⚡ Clearance Secret ⚡
Between the giant pink candy canes and the marshmallow trampoline, jump at the center of the trampoline with continuous crouching momentum to land directly on the gingerbread roof.

Guides editing… Wobbly Bob telemetry is feeded live from Bobs worldwide. Got a faster route? Submit your highlights to us!

item.title: ⚙️ Level 29: Steampunk Party
item.description:
⚙️ Level 29: Steampunk Party

Current Status: 📡 Dream signals syncing… To be continued, stay tuned for the latest detailed level guides. Level Matrix: Difficulty ⭐⭐⭐⭐☆ | Est. Duration 35 Mins

📸 ⚙️ Level 29: Steampunk Party Level Overview - Dreamscape Coordinate Calibration

🔑 Level Clearance Secrets (MISSION TIPS)

Every dream level features unique gaps in its physics logic. While our full walkthrough captures are being uploaded, we have unlocked the Clearance Secret for you:

⚡ Clearance Secret ⚡
Step on the top of the continuously moving giant piston cylinder, and jump in the opposite direction at its peak height to climb directly onto the steam airship basket.

Guides editing… Wobbly Bob telemetry is feeded live from Bobs worldwide. Got a faster route? Submit your highlights to us!

item.title: 🪓 Level 30: Viking
item.description:
🪓 Level 30: Viking

Current Status: 📡 Dream signals syncing… To be continued, stay tuned for the latest detailed level guides. Level Matrix: Difficulty ⭐⭐⭐⭐☆ | Est. Duration 35 Mins

📸 🪓 Level 30: Viking Level Overview - Dreamscape Coordinate Calibration

🔑 Level Clearance Secrets (MISSION TIPS)

Every dream level features unique gaps in its physics logic. While our full walkthrough captures are being uploaded, we have unlocked the Clearance Secret for you:

⚡ Clearance Secret ⚡
Push the battering ram to its maximum speed and grab it. The moment it hits the castle gate, let go to fling yourself directly into the castle front yard.

Guides editing… Wobbly Bob telemetry is feeded live from Bobs worldwide. Got a faster route? Submit your highlights to us!
